nasb.text: “How can you say, ‘We are wise, And the law of the Lord is with us’? But behold, the lying pen of the scribes Has made it into a lie.

esv.text: “How can you say, ‘We are wise, and the law of the Lord is with us’? But behold, the lying pen of the scribes has made it into a lie.

cnv.text: 你們怎可以說：“我們是智慧人， 我們有耶和華的律法”呢？ 事實上，經學家虛假的筆 已把律法變成謊言了。

ccb.text: “你们怎能说，‘我们有智慧， 因为我们有耶和华的律法’？ 事实上，律法教师撒谎的笔把律法篡改了。
